info.title: SDKWork Notary Backend API
info.description: Operator-facing notary API. Backend operations compose Appbase, Commerce, and Drive through dependency SDKs.

post.summary: Open notary business for an enterprise-verified organization

patch.summary: Update notary organization profile settings or status

post.summary: Create a notary matter by creating one Commerce SPU with one SKU
Assign an IAM organization member to a notary case

get.summary: List IAM organization members enabled for notary business

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.
